---
title: "Exploratory Visualization 1"
author: "Lukas Lescano, Garrett Mellinger, Minh Tri Ngo"
date: "2026-05-20"
format: pdf
---

# Exploring percentage point change of grassland plots from post fire disturbance to post sheep disturbance on the NCOS Mesa

```{r}
#| label: calculating sheep grazing change in mean percent cover
#| message: false
#| echo: false

## Change in percentage points of focal species percent cover
## 2024 = pre-grazing
## 2025 = post-grazing

focal_species_sheep <- tibble(
  psoc = c(
    "Stipa_pulchra",
    "Medicago_polymorpha",
    "Melilotus_indicus",
    "Festuca_perennis"
  ),
  species_label = c(
    "S. pulchra",
    "M. polymorpha",
    "M. indicus",
    "F. perennis"
  ),
  status = c(
    "Native",
    "Invasive",
    "Invasive",
    "Invasive"
  )
)

focal_cover_sheep <- gl_explicit0 |>
  filter(
    year %in% c(2024, 2025),
    psoc %in% focal_species_sheep$psoc
  ) |>
  select(year, transect_name, psoc, mean_pc) |>
  left_join(focal_species_sheep, by = "psoc")

focal_change_transect_sheep_pp <- focal_cover_sheep |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = year,
    values_from = mean_pc,
    names_prefix = "year_"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    percent_point_change = year_2025 - year_2024
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(percent_point_change))

focal_change_summary_sheep_pp <- focal_change_transect_sheep_pp |>
  group_by(psoc, species_label, status) |>
  summarize(
    mean_percent_point_change = mean(percent_point_change, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    species_label = factor(
      species_label,
      levels = c(
        "S. pulchra",
        "M. polymorpha",
        "M. indicus",
        "F. perennis"
      )
    ),
    status = factor(status, levels = c("Native", "Invasive"))
  )

focal_change_summary_sheep_pp
```

```{r}
#| label: plotting sheep grazing change in mean percent cover
#| message: false
#| echo: false

percent_point_cover_change_sheep_plot <- ggplot(
  focal_change_summary_sheep_pp,
  aes(x = species_label, y = mean_percent_point_change, fill = status)
) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6) +
  geom_jitter(
    data = focal_change_transect_sheep_pp,
    aes(x = species_label, y = percent_point_change, color = status),
    width = 0.08,
    height = 0,
    size = 2,
    alpha = 0.6,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_hline(
    yintercept = 0,
    color = "gray50"
  ) +
  geom_text(
    aes(
      label = round(mean_percent_point_change, 0),
      y = if_else(
        mean_percent_point_change >= 0,
        mean_percent_point_change + 2,
        mean_percent_point_change - 2
      )
    ),
    size = 5,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Native" = "#005AB5",
      "Invasive" = "#DC3220"
    )
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "Native" = "#005AB5",
      "Invasive" = "#DC3220"
    ),
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Change in Mean % Cover of Key Species Post-grazing",
    x = "Species",
    y = "Change in Mean % Cover\n(percentage points)",
    fill = NULL
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(
      size = 18,
      face = "bold",
      hjust = 0.5
    ),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 13,
      face = "italic"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.position = c(0.15, 0.82),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent")
  )

percent_point_cover_change_sheep_plot
```
